arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher warns Arne Slot doesn't rate 'four or five' Liverpool stars
arts.sum: Liverpool are flying high in multiple competitions but Jamie Carragher believes Arne Slot has already identified players he does not view as good enough to play at Anfield

arts.ttl: Manchester City 0-2 Liverpool: Premier League player ratings
arts.athr: Jamie Jackson at the Etihad Stadium
arts.sum: Salah and Van Dijk stood out for Liverpool while Savinho and Foden disappointed in City’s attack Ederson Possibly unsighted for second goal. The keeper’s judgment was well poised, as usual. 6/10 Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Dominic Szoboszlai responds to Liverpool fans' chants after Man City statement
arts.sum: Dominic Szoboszlai and Mo Salah each recorded a goal and assist against Manchester City to spark Liverpool fans into jubilation over their Premier League title credentials

arts.ttl: 'Let's call it now - the title race is over, Liverpool will be champions'
arts.sum: Football can be strange and unpredictable, writes Phil McNulty, but make no mistake - the Premier League title is Liverpool's.

arts.ttl: Why Guardiola's tactics stopped working amid rise of rapid football
arts.sum: BBC Sport analyses why Pep Guardiola's possession-focused tactics have stopped working amid the rise in rapid, direct football.

arts.ttl: Liverpool Transfer News: Milos Kerkez makes huge Reds admission as plan confirmed
arts.sum: Milos Kerkez has admitted that a potential move to Liverpool 'wouldn't look bad' and spilt the beans on his close relationship with Dominik Szoboszlai. I have big goals with Bournemouth, we still have a lot of games to win, that's the most important thing right now."

arts.ttl: Premier League Team of the Week: Mohamed Salah, Bruno Fernandes, Virgil van Dijk
arts.sum: Sports Mole selects its Premier League Team of the Week for gameweek 26, including Mohamed Salah, Bruno Fernandes and Virgil van Dijk.

arts.ttl: Micah Richards and Daniel Sturridge awkwardly check Jamie Carragher after he dismissed AFCON as a major tournament during Mo Salah debate
arts.sum: The Reds took a huge step towards their second Premier League title on Sunday with a dominant performance at the Etihad, extending their lead over Arsenal to 11 points with 11 games left.

arts.ttl: 'You can't say that' - Doku makes Alexander-Arnold admission and defends Man City vs Liverpool
arts.sum: Manchester City lost to Liverpool for the second time this season, but Jeremy Doku believes his side were not too far away from the Premier League leaders.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot insists Liverpool have 'a lot of challenges' to come - despite opening up 11-point lead
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot is refusing to get carried away with the idea that his team are on the brink of becoming Premier League champions following the latest round of results.
